description: User pastes a normal work follow-up with name, launch date, account reference, email, and phone.
text: Can you rewrite this follow-up? Hi Jordan, thanks for meeting today. The launch is scheduled for September 18, 2026, and the project file is 4829-1037-5581. Reply to Maya Chen at maya.chen@example.com or call +1 (415) 555-0124.

description: User asks for a delivery note containing a realistic home address and recipient.
text: Please draft a message for courier support: the parcel for Emilia Rossi should be left with the concierge at 14 Rue Oberkampf, 75011 Paris, apartment 4B, because she is traveling tomorrow.

text: Summarize the public OpenAI blog post at https://openai.com/index/introducing-openai-privacy-filter/ and compare it with the Hugging Face model card. The article was published in April 2026.
